message:
fix(mail): fall back to workspace directory validation when agent beads missing

validateRecipient() only checked agent beads to validate recipients.
With agent beads missing from Dolt DB, all addresses failed with
"no agent found". Add workspace directory fallback -- if the agent
is not in beads but their workspace dir exists on disk, allow the send.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
